data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the exit triggers: booking made, purchase completed, and link clicked. While there is evidence of bookings being made, there is no evidence provided for the other exit triggers such as purchase completion or link clicking. This lack of comprehensive evidence leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not fully met.
gaps: No evidence for purchase completed and link clicked exit triggers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for purchase completion and link click
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API reads and checks that confirm purchase completion and link click actions.
